steps.title: Spot the directional opposition
steps.content: Cartographers start at “the lowest point” while hydrologists start “at the top”—these are opposite directions. The opposition between the two approaches is the decisive signal.

steps.title: Match the transition signal
steps.content: By contrast is a transition word designed for exactly this purpose: to shift from one approach to its opposite. The other three—in a similar way, for example, and in other words—all signal similarity or repetition rather than opposition. That matches choice C — C is correct.
